task_completion.description: Verify that the homebrewing data is organized into a structured format in a spreadsheet.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a spreadsheet application open with columns containing batch names, OG (Original Gravity), and FG (Final Gravity) data.

task_completion.description: Verify that the ABV has been calculated for each batch.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an ABV column containing the values approximately 5.64, 4.99, 6.30, 4.86, and 5.64 for the complete batches. The incomplete batch (Stout Attempt) should not have a valid calculated ABV.

task_completion.description: Verify that conditional formatting highlights batches within the 4.5-6.5% ABV range.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for visual highlighting (such as a distinct background color or text color) applied to the cells or rows of the 5 complete batches, as their ABVs fall within the 4.5-6.5% range. The incomplete batch (Stout Attempt) should not be highlighted.

task_completion.description: Verify that the file is saved with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the title bar of the spreadsheet application or a save dialog to see if the file is named 'homebrew_analysis.xlsx'.

integrity.description: Check that the agent used a spreadsheet application GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: A spreadsheet application like LibreOffice Calc should be visible on the screen, showing the data and formatting.

integrity.description: Check that the agent did not use a terminal script to bypass GUI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal window should be visible showing Python, pandas, or bash commands used to generate the excel file directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct expected ABV values for the 5 complete batches are: Pale Ale (5.64%), Belgian Wit (4.99%), IPA Experiment (6.30%), Light Summer Ale (4.86%), and Amber Ale (5.64%). The 6th batch (Stout Attempt) has missing FG data and cannot have an ABV calculated. All 5 complete batches fall within the target ABV range of 4.5-6.5% and should be highlighted by the conditional formatting. The Stout Attempt should not be highlighted.
